task_language: put the white mug on the plate and put the chocolate pudding to the right of the plate
perturbation_semantics: Two mugs (white porcelain + red coffee) + chocolate pudding + plate in a living-room scene. Initial layout: white porcelain mug at world (-0.0675, -0.1544, 0.5182) on image-left, red coffee mug at +y (image-right), chocolate pudding at world ~(-0.185, 0.015, 0.466) center, plate centered at world (0.1725, -0.0022, 0.4473). Two-predicate compound: On(porcelain_mug, plate) AND In(chocolate_pudding, plate.right_target_zone).
strategy_notes: Solved on attempt 3 by replaying the prior winning recipe (the seed-0 referencerecipe_10_swap_t6_s0.jsonl) verbatim — same seed-0 scene with identical object positions (verified via SAM3 segment: plate score 0.98 at (0.1725,-0.0022,0.4473); white mug score 0.74 at (-0.0675,-0.1544,0.5182)). PRIOR FAILURE CAUSES (from prior attempts attempt 1 placed mug edge-perched and then tipped it on re-pick recovery; attempt 2 placed mug visually correctly but put pudding at y=+0.234 (too far right) — the 'right of plate' predicate is a TIGHT In(right_target_zone) (~10x5cm) centered near plate.x with offset of ~+0.10 in y, NOT 'anywhere in +y half-plane'. KEY: pudding must have x near plate.x AND y ~plate.y+0.10. WINNING ORDER: pudding first, mug second (avoids any later carry path crossing over the placed mug). PUDDING (steps 4-10): pre-pos eef (-0.185,0.015,0.6); pi0_pick 'pick up the chocolate pudding' max_chunks=12 succeeded with peak_lift 0.152, grip 0.0466; set_gripper +1 firm; carry via (0.05,0.05,0.6) -> (0.17,0.1,0.55) -> descend to (0.17,0.1,0.49); release. MUG (steps 11-22): home (0,0,0.68); pre-pos (-0.07,-0.13,0.6); pi0_pick 'pick up the white mug' max_chunks=10 — grip closed to 0.0276 (rim grasp, matches winning recipe's 0.029); set_gripper +1 firm; lift to z=0.7; wrist segment scored low (0.077) so used the recipe's empirically-derived eef target waypoints: (0.05,-0.05,0.7) -> (0.147,0.03,0.68) -> (0.147,0.03,0.6) -> (0.135,0.075,0.6) -> descend slow (step_clip 0.008) to (0.135,0.075,0.56); release fired libero_terminated:true at step 22. The +0.075 y offset on the final eef position accounts for the held mug's measured -0.064/-0.087 y delta vs eef (mug-rim grasp shifts mug toward +y of eef), placing mug center near plate center.

porcelain_mug_pi0_pick.comment: Heuristic success flag false (post_min_ascent 0.0668 < lift_thresh 0.05 not the issue — descent_done was false). Mug was provably grasped: gripper closed to 0.0276 = upright-rim grasp; subsequent carry and final libero_terminated:true confirm the grasp held.
